description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image. Include a before_script that runs apt-get -qq update and apt-get install -y jq. Define a single job named "build and test" (default stage) that caches the node_modules/ directory, runs npm install, npm run compile, npm run test, extracts ABIs with "jq '.abi'" and bytecode with "jq -r '.bytecode'" from each build/contracts/*.json file, flattens each contracts/*.sol file using ./node_modules/.bin/truffle‑flattener into an artifacts/ directory, copies the generated .abi and .bin files into artifacts/, and writes a README.md containing the solcjs version and the commit SHA. The job stores the artifacts/ directory as an artifact that expires in one month. No special rules or deployment targets are defined.
